name: Dark Lucius LV8
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>漆黒の魔王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ダーク・ルシアス</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＬＶ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>レベル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>８
desc: If this card was Special Summoned by the effect of "Dark Lucius LV6", banish your opponent's monsters destroyed by battle with this card, also negate their effects.

eff: If this card was Special Summoned by the effect of "Dark Lucius LV6", banish your opponent's monsters destroyed by battle with this card, also negate their effects.

mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
